{{CargoRelic
|name=Gold Toilet Paper
|class_id=20011
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This toilet paper was found in a home without any bathrooms, making its purpose extremely suspicious! Why didn't the previous Snail take it?
|fame=19
|art=27
|fth=16
|civ=15
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail HP +100
|ss2=Snail HP +200
|ss3=Snail HP +300
|ss4=Snail HP +300
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br> (Awakened)
}}
